c1.descriptionRaw:
The AoE of the automaton doll "Tamoto" summoned by <color=#FFD780FF>Fluttering Hasode</color> is increased by 50%.
Additionally, if there is a <color=#FFE699FF>Geo</color> party member other than Chiori, Fluttering Hasode will trigger the following after the dash is completed:
· Summon an additional Tamoto. Only one additional Tamoto can exist at the same time, whether summoned by Chiori this way or through the presence of a Geo Construct.
· Triggers the Ascension Talent "The Finishing Touch." You must first unlock the Ascension Talent "The Finishing Touch."
c1.name: Six Paths of Sage Silkcraft

c2.descriptionRaw:
For 10s after using <color=#FFD780FF>Hiyoku: Twin Blades</color>, a simplified automaton doll, "Kinu," will be summoned next to your active character every 3s. Kinu will attack nearby opponents, dealing <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color> equivalent to 170% of Tamoto's DMG. DMG dealt this way is considered Elemental Skill DMG.
Kinu will leave the field after 1 attack or after lasting 3s.
c2.name: In Five Colors Dyed

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Fluttering Hasode</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: Four Brocade Embellishments

c4.descriptionRaw:
For 8s after triggering either follow-up effect of the Ascension Talent "Tailor-Made," when your current active character's Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks hit a nearby opponent, a simplified automaton doll, "Kinu," will be summoned near this opponent. You can summon 1 Kinu every 1s in this way, and up to 3 Kinu may be summoned this way during each instance of "Tailor-Made"'s Seize the Moment or Tailoring effect. The above effect can be triggered up to once every 15s.
You must first unlock the Ascension Talent "Tailor-Made."
c4.name: A Tailor's Three Courtesies

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Hiyoku: Twin Blades</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: Two Silken Plumules

c6.descriptionRaw:
After triggering a follow-up effect of the Ascension Talent "Tailor-Made," Chiori's own <color=#FFD780FF>Fluttering Hasode</color>'s CD is decreased by 12s. You must first unlock the Ascension Talent "Tailor-Made.".
In addition, the DMG dealt by Chiori's own Normal Attacks is increased by an amount equal to 235% of her own DEF.
c6.name: Sole Principle Pursuit

profile.description: The owner of Chioriya Boutique. A tailor renowned throughout Fontaine.
profile.name: Chiori
profile.title: The Thundering Seamstress

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 4 rapid strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.
combat1.name: Weaving Blade

labels: Upward Sweep Attack DMG|{param5:P} ATK+{param6:P} DEF

combat2.descriptionRaw: Dashes nimbly forward with silken steps. Once this dash ends, Chiori will summon the automaton doll "Tamoto" beside her and sweep her blade upward, dealing AoE Geo DMG to nearby opponents based on her ATK and DEF. Holding the Skill will cause it to behave differently. Hold Enter Aiming Mode to adjust the dash direction. Tamoto · Will slash at nearby opponents at intervals, dealing AoE Geo DMG based on Chiori's ATK and DEF. · While active, if there are nearby Geo Construct(s) or Geo Construct(s) are created nearby, an additional Tamoto will be summoned next to your active character. Only 1 additional Tamoto can be summoned in this manner, and its duration is independently counted. "Sakura red dyes the brocade, the fragrance suffuses the sleeves, the orioles intoxicated."
combat2.name: Fluttering Hasode

combat3.descriptionRaw: Twin blades leave their sheaths as Chiori slices with the clean cuts of a master tailor, dealing AoE Geo DMG based on her ATK and DEF. "Master one principle, and the path to all others shall open to you."
combat3.name: Hiyoku: Twin Blades

passive1.descriptionRaw:
#Gain different effects depending on the next action you take within a short duration after using <color=#FFD780FF>Fluttering Hasode</color>'s upward sweep. If you {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} the Elemental Skill, you will trigger the Tapestry effect. If you {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} your Normal Attack, the Tailoring effect will be triggered instead.

<color=#FFD780FF>Tapestry</color>
· Switches to the next character in your roster.
· Grants all your party members "Seize the Moment": When your active party member's Normal Attacks, Charged Attacks, and Plunging Attacks hit a nearby opponent, "Tamoto" will execute a coordinated attack, dealing 100% of Fluttering Hasode's upward sweep DMG as <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color> at the opponent's location. DMG dealt this way is considered Elemental Skill DMG.
· "Seize the Moment" lasts 8s, and 1 of "Tamoto"'s coordinated attack can be unleashed every 2s. 2 such coordinated attacks can occur per "Seize the Moment" effect duration.

<color=#FFD780FF>Tailoring</color>
· Chiori gains <color=#FFE699FF>Geo infusion</color> for 5s.

When on the field, if Chiori does not either {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} her Elemental Skill or use a Normal Attack within a short time after using Fluttering Hasode's upward sweep, the Tailoring effect will be triggered by default.
passive1.name: Tailor-Made

passive2.descriptionRaw: When a nearby party member creates a <color=#FFE699FF>Geo Construct</color>, Chiori will gain 20% <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG Bonus</color> for 20s.
passive2.name: The Finishing Touch

passive3.descriptionRaw:
When any party member is wearing an outfit apart from their default outfit, or is wearing a wind glider other than the Wings of First Flight, your party members will obtain the Swift Stride effect: Movement SPD is increased by 10%.
This effect does not take effect in Domains, Trounce Domains, and the Spiral Abyss. Swift Stride does not stack.
passive3.name: Brocaded Collar's Beauteous Silhouette
